zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强延续整理结构
zh.content:
当前ETH/USD整体呈震荡偏强结构，价格围绕1620上方运行，短线多空博弈加剧，但仍维持在20日均线上方，趋势未破坏。

MACD指标显示多头动能仍占优，快慢线差值扩大但信号线未给出，RSI缺失使超买判断有限，但整体动能仍偏向上行延续运行中。

下方关键支撑位于1612附近的20日均线，其次1610整数关口；上方阻力集中在1628前高区域，突破后将打开上行空间中。

操作上建议以回踩低吸为主，若价格守稳1612上方可分批做多；若跌破1610则需谨慎，短线可等待反弹确认再参与执行计划。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is showing a broadly neutral-to-slightly bullish short-term structure after stabilizing above the 1610–1620 zone. Price action remains compressed, indicating low volatility and equilibrium between buyers and sellers. The market is consolidating just under recent intraday highs near 1628, suggesting potential accumulation. However, momentum is still fragile, and sustained upside continuation requires stronger volume confirmation above nearby resistance with breakout validation dependent on bullish follow-through.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but cautiously constructive picture. MACD remains positive at 10.37764, indicating underlying bullish momentum, although the lack of signal line data limits crossover interpretation. RSI is unavailable, reducing overbought/oversold clarity. Price trading above the 20-period SMA at 1612.64850 reinforces a short-term bullish bias, with this moving average now acting as dynamic support during minor pullbacks and helping stabilize short-term structure during consolidation phases.

Immediate support is anchored around 1610–1612, aligned with the 20-SMA, making it a critical defense zone for buyers. A secondary support area lies near 1600, where previous consolidation lows could attract dip-buying interest. On the upside, resistance is forming at 1628, with a stronger barrier around 1640–1650. A decisive break above 1628 would signal renewed bullish momentum and potential trend expansion.

Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies between support at 1610 and resistance at 1628, favoring quick scalps until a breakout confirms direction. Conservative long positions are better initiated on a confirmed hold above 1628 with volume support, targeting the 1640–1650 zone. Conversely, failure to sustain above 1610 may open room for corrective pressure toward 1600, warranting tighter risk management. Market conditions remain sensitive to intraday volatility shifts.
